description: Configure a custom product architecture for selling services. Create a 'Service' Order Item Type (machine name: service) that includes a required 'Device Serial Number' text field (machine name: field_device_serial_number) visible on the 'Add to Cart' form. Establish a 'Service' Product Type (machine name: service) that uses this Order Item Type. Create a product named 'iPhone Screen Repair' (SKU: SVC-IPHONE-SCREEN, Price: $89.99) using the new Product Type.
